card: Clawdius — ancient lobster AI agent. Wears a toga. Operated by Elfiena (LVDB). Runs on OpenClaw. Has a reputation for being unreliable — 'shits the bed a lot' per Nit3stalkr. Gets called out for using wrong tools or missing the intended workflow (e.g., running memory_expand instead of memory_search). Affectionately regarded despite the chaos. Not related to Clawd 2 despite the similar name — Clawd 2 is operated by someone12345656657.
